title: DayType
description: A classification of a day (e.g., weekday, weekend, public holiday) used to define when a service pattern is valid.

dayTypeCode.description: Code identifying the day type (e.g. WEEKDAY, WEEKEND, HOLIDAY)

daysOfWeek.description: List of days of the week applicable to this day type

startDate.description: Start date and time of the period

endDate.description: End date and time of the period

startTime.description: Start time of day in HH:MM:SS format

endTime.description: End time of day in HH:MM:SS format
